steps.title: Use the no-solution condition
steps.content: A system has no solution when the equations have proportional variable terms but different constants. Then the lines are parallel and distinct.

steps.title: Test the parallel pair
steps.content:
For the system with $-3x+5y=12$ and $6x-10y=30$, multiply the first equation by $-2$.
$$-2(-3x+5y)=-2(12)$$
$$6x-10y=-24$$
The second equation has the same left side but equals $30$.

steps.title: Identify the contradiction
steps.content: The system requires $6x-10y$ to equal both $-24$ and $30$, which is impossible. The answer is D.
